drones.name: Grav Inhibitor Drone
abilities: Unyielding

Drone protocols: Drones are ignored when determining the unit's most used Toughness and Defensive rules. They move as fast as the unit they are attached to and only use the attached unit's movement restriction. They are considered as being part of the model that controls them. Drones controlled by a Drone controller can not be removed as casualties.
Grav inhibitor: Grav Inhibitor Drones reduce enemy Charge movements that target the model or its attached unit by 2".

Accelerator: Pulse Accelerator Drones increase the range of all pulse weapons in the unit by 6".

abilities: Unyielding

Drone protocols: Drones are ignored when determining the unit's most used Toughness and Defensive rules. They move as fast as the unit they are attached to and only use the attached unit's movement restriction. They are considered as being part of the model that controls them. Drones controlled by a Drone controller can not be removed as casualties.
Shielded: Shield Drones confer a 5+ invulnerability save to themselves and their attached units.

drones.name: Missile Drone
abilities: Unyielding

Drone protocols: Drones are ignored when determining the unit's most used Toughness and Defensive rules. They move as fast as the unit they are attached to and only use the attached unit's movement restriction. They are considered as being part of the model that controls them. Drones controlled by a Drone controller can not be removed as casualties.

drones.name: Sniper Drone
abilities: Unyielding

Drone protocols: Drones are ignored when determining the unit's most used Toughness and Defensive rules. They move as fast as the unit they are attached to and only use the attached unit's movement restriction. They are considered as being part of the model that controls them. Drones controlled by a Drone controller can not be removed as casualties.
Note: Sniper Drones outside of a Drone controller's escort are not controlled by it and can be removed as casualties normally.

drones.name: Stealth Drone
abilities: Unyielding

Drone protocols: Drones are ignored when determining the unit's most used Toughness and Defensive rules. They move as fast as the unit they are attached to and only use the attached unit's movement restriction. They are considered as being part of the model that controls them. Drones controlled by a Drone controller can not be removed as casualties.
Shrouded: Stealth Drones confer the ability "Stealth" and "Use cover" to themselves and their attached units.

drones.name: Warscaper Drone
abilities: Unyielding

Drone protocols: Drones are ignored when determining the unit's most used Toughness and Defensive rules. They move as fast as the unit they are attached to and only use the attached unit's movement restriction. They are considered as being part of the model that controls them. Drones controlled by a Drone controller can not be removed as casualties.
Environmental scan: Enemy units charging a unit with a Warscaper Drone have to make a dangerous terrain test after their charge.

options_note: Must be bought from the armory as part of the Drone controller upgrade and can't be fielded by themselves.
